2604.26419.title: Delineating Knowledge Boundaries for Honest Large Vision-Language Models
2604.26419.paper_summary: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable multimodal performance yet remain prone to factual hallucinations, particularly in long-tail or specialized domains. Moreover, current models exhibit a weak capacity to refuse queries that exceed their parametric knowledge. In this paper, we propose a systematic framework to enhance the refusal capability of VLMs when facing such unknown questions. We first curate a model-specific "Visual-Idk" (Visual-I don't know) dataset, leveraging multi-sample consistency probing to distinguish between known and unknown facts. We then align the model using supervised fine-tuning followed by preference-aware optimization (e.g., DPO, ORPO) to effectively delineate its knowledge boundaries. Results on the Visual-Idk dataset show our method improves the Truthful Rate from 57.9\% to 67.3\%. Additionally, internal probing also demonstrates that the model genuinely recognizes its boundaries instead of just memorizing refusal patterns. Our framework further generalizes to out-of-distribution medical and perceptual domains, providing a robust path toward more trustworthy and prudent visual assistants.
2604.26419.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺語言模型（VLMs）在多模態性能上取得了顯著的成就，但仍然容易出現事實幻覺，特別是在長尾或專業領域。此外，當前模型對於超出其參數知識的查詢表現出較弱的拒絕能力。在本文中，我們提出了一個系統性的框架，以增強VLMs在面對這類未知問題時的拒絕能力。我們首先策劃了一個模型特定的「Visual-Idk」（視覺-我不知道）數據集，利用多樣本一致性探測來區分已知與未知的事實。然後，我們使用監督微調和偏好感知優化（例如，DPO，ORPO）來對模型進行對齊，以有效劃定其知識邊界。在Visual-Idk數據集上的結果顯示，我們的方法將真實率從57.9\%提高到67.3\%。此外，內部探測還顯示該模型真正認識到其邊界，而不僅僅是記憶拒絕模式。我們的框架進一步推廣到分佈外的醫療和感知領域，為更值得信賴和謹慎的視覺助手提供了一條穩健的道路。
2604.26419.author: Junru Song et.al.
2604.26419.authors: Junru Song, Yimeng Hu, Yijing Chen, Huining Li, Qian Li, Lizhen Cui, Yuntao Du
